economic_notes: Nation has investments in SXDC Ltd. (wholly-owned) and SXD Limited Partnership (99.99%). COVID-19 related funding received totalling $507,002 ($445,650 from ISC and $61,352 from FNHA). Nation operates a First Nation Store.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unavailability of audited financial statements for SXDC Ltd. and SXD Limited Partnership (two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method). Nation is located in Dog Creek, BC. Funds held in Ottawa Trust of $1,415,017 included in financial assets. Restricted gaming revenue cash of $749,140 included in cash balance. Capital lease obligation of $40,802 exists for John Deere equipment. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $5,385,933 + Province of BC $1,601,119 + NSTS $627,838 + TCHS $432,671 + FNHA $245,897 + FNESC $198,066 + CMHC $20,600 + CCATEC $169,562 + DFO $142948 + First Peoples Cultural Council $142,891 + Enbridge $64,000 = $9,031,525 approximate; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. annual_debt_service is repayment of debt $191,435 plus capital lease repayment $20,805 = $212,240.
